sourceMovie.title: Disenchanted
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Disenchanted works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and family blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Shrek 2
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Disenchanted clicked for you, Shrek 2 (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and family, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Enchanted
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Disenchanted clicked for you, Enchanted (2007) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and family, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Disenchanted?
faq.answer: Try Shrek 2, Enchanted, The Princess Bride—each shares DNA with Disenchanted while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Disenchanted?
faq.answer: Disenchanted (2022) is best described as Comedy, Family, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Disenchanted part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Enchanted Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
